title: Totem of Boetacular (BoeTotem)
description: A cool custom totem I made of my persona, Boetacular. 32x32 texture.
body:
A cool custom totem I made of my persona, Boetacular. 32x32 texture.
Makes the old Roblox thunder sound effect when used.
![PRAISE THE HOLY BOE TOTEM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a858f4ffc480611163bc8d6bdc18d7f20e80f759.png)
![What it looks like in first person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/776516342c214641646408a3e04ccbc0602f7bee.png)
![What it looks like when you use it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ba3c6f0d927af6a903b72bd00786a9cb6e419a1.png)
